notes.name: Cam Ward
notes.summary: Elite arm talent with exceptional touch and feel. Outstanding pre-snap processing and pocket mobility. Boom-or-bust accuracy in tight windows; NFL-ready starter with immediate impact potential.

notes.name: Travis Hunter
notes.summary: Generational two-way talent — elite press coverage skills and legitimate wide receiver ability. Exceptional competitor and ball-hawk. Usage split between offense and defense will define his impact.

notes.name: Abdul Carter
notes.summary: Freaky athleticism with elite first-step quickness off the edge. Pass-rush arsenal still developing but upside is transcendent. Could develop into a generational pass rusher within 2-3 seasons.

notes.name: Ashton Jeanty
notes.summary: Production monster with elite contact balance and vision. Among the most decorated backs since Saquon Barkley. RB positional value discount is the only knock; pure talent is undeniable.

notes.name: Will Campbell
notes.summary: Technically refined left tackle with outstanding footwork and anchor. Ideal NFL frame with plus recovery athleticism. Scheme-versatile and ready to start Day 1 in any system.

notes.name: Tetairoa McMillan
notes.summary: Elite size-speed combo for the position with contested-catch dominance. Outstanding body control in the intermediate-to-deep range. Separation vs. press coverage needs refinement at next level.

notes.name: Mason Graham
notes.summary: Disruptive interior presence with elite quickness and motor. Flashes penetration ability that disrupts backfield action. Fits any front — potentially elite run defender with pass-rush upside.

notes.name: Shedeur Sanders
notes.summary: Exceptional anticipation and processing with pro-ready mechanics. Immaculate pocket presence and timing. Questions about athleticism and arm strength pushing through contested windows at NFL level.

notes.name: Tyler Warren
notes.summary: Complete tight end profile — dominant blocker with legitimate receiving threat capability. Rare combination of physicality and route-running refinement. Should contribute early in-line and as a move TE.

notes.name: Mykel Williams
notes.summary: Long, powerful edge with tantalizing athletic traits. Pass-rush plan still developing but first step and motor are elite. High-ceiling developmental prospect who could break out in year 2.

notes.name: Kelvin Banks Jr.
notes.summary: Technically polished left tackle with advanced hand usage and footwork. Exceptional anchor strength for position. Lacks elite athleticism but the processing and technique are already NFL-caliber.

notes.name: Colston Loveland
notes.summary: Smooth route runner with outstanding acceleration and separation ability for the position. Reliable hands and YAC ability. Blocking needs development but receiving upside is legitimate top-10 caliber.

notes.name: Jihaad Campbell
notes.summary: Explosive linebacker with elite athleticism and pass-rush versatility. Plays sideline-to-sideline with range. Still developing processing and coverage footwork but physical tools are rare at the position.

notes.name: Omarion Hampton
notes.summary: Power runner with elite contact balance and surprising speed. Heavy workload at Carolina may concern some teams. Consistent yards-after-contact producer who fits zone and gap schemes equally.

notes.name: Dillon Gabriel
notes.summary: High-accuracy processor with superb touch and timing. Elite decision-making and pre-snap manipulation. Limited arm strength and athleticism raise questions about NFL ceiling despite polished college profile.

notes.name: Malaki Starks
notes.summary: Elite range and ball-hawking instincts from the safety position. Fluid in coverage with zone and man versatility. Size is slightly below average but the football IQ and playmaking are outstanding.
